objectives.text: Ask the Faber household about Noa’s school place.
Learn what the placement office will accept.
Decide how Noa leaves South Measure.

stages.task: Ask the Faber household about Noa
stages.description: Noa Faber has earned a northern machine-school place. The form counts her as a household of one.
Noa can take the place alone or delay one season. A family review offers a lawful route for Isaac and Tobit; a forged household page offers another.
Noa’s school route now reflects the family decision made at South Measure.
